title: Orbital Strike Stick
description: A stick the spawns TNT when you right click (Don't press shift+RC)
body: This adds a stick that spawns 200 TNT in a 5x5 area when you RC (Breaks after 1 use).Shift+RC spawns 2000 TNT in a 100x100 area (beware multiple uses at the same time may cause crashes or extreme lag)
